privileged_info_summary: The docker_entrypoint_debug@1 task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh, which intentionally provisions 4 Docker microservices at /home/ga/projects/acme-services with specific entrypoint bugs: (1) acme-cache-warmer uses Bash syntax ([[ ]] and array syntax) in an Alpine container that only has /bin/sh, (2) acme-event-processor has CRLF line endings in its entrypoint script, (3) acme-report-generator uses 'set -e' with a failing grep command that causes immediate exit, and (4) acme-static-server sources a config file from an incorrect path (/etc/nginx/conf.d/env.conf) when the file is actually at /etc/nginx/env.conf. Task success is verified via verifier.py which checks container running status, health checks (log inspection and HTTP endpoints), image rebuild timestamps, and the presence of a debugging report at /home/ga/Desktop/debugging_report.txt. Pass threshold is 60/100 points (60%).
